overview: A real-time Bitcoin dashboard with live candlestick charts, dual USD/INR price display, news sentiment analysis, and a stunning Binance-inspired dark theme.
features: Live BTC price in USD and INR with auto-refresh every 30 seconds
Interactive candlestick chart with 30-candle OHLC history
Binance dark theme with green/red candle colors
News sentiment analysis feed with 5 latest Bitcoin articles
Live connection status and refresh countdown timer
Smooth price update animations and transitions
